mapper.sql: select c.contract_id, c.contract_no, c.customer_id, lc.customer_name, c.user_id, su.user_name, c.dept_id, c.product_name, c.attachment_urls, c.contract_amount, c.disburse_amount, c.first_fee_amount, c.second_fee_amount, c.first_fee_paid, c.second_fee_paid, c.status, c.sign_time, c.submit_time, c.finance_audit_time, c.bank_loan_time, c.finance_user_id, c.bank_result, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from loan_contract c left join loan_customer lc on c.customer_id = lc.customer_id left join sys_user su on c.user_id = su.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into loan_contract( contract_no, customer_id, user_id, dept_id, product_name, attachment_urls, contract_amount, disburse_amount, first_fee_amount, second_fee_amount, first_fee_paid, second_fee_paid, status, sign_time, submit_time, finance_audit_time, bank_loan_time, finance_user_id, bank_result, create_by, create_time, remark )values( #{contractNo}, #{customerId}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{productName}, #{attachmentUrls}, #{contractAmount}, #{disburseAmount}, #{firstFeeAmount}, #{secondFeeAmount}, #{firstFeePaid}, #{secondFeePaid}, #{status}, #{signTime}, #{submitTime}, #{financeAuditTime}, #{bankLoanTime}, #{financeUserId}, #{bankResult}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from loan_contract where contract_id in
#{contractId}
mapper.update: update loan_contract set status = 'FINANCE_REVIEW', submit_time = #{submitTime}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where contract_id = #{contractId}
mapper.select: select f.fee_id, f.contract_id, c.contract_no, f.stage, f.amount, f.pay_method, f.payer_name, f.pay_time, f.collector_user_id, f.collector_user_name, f.status, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.remark from loan_fee_record f left join loan_contract c on f.contract_id = c.contract_id where f.contract_id = #{contractId} order by f.pay_time desc, f.fee_id desc
mapper.update: update loan_contract set first_fee_paid = #{firstFeePaid}, second_fee_paid = #{secondFeePaid}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where contract_id = #{contractId}
